name: Ayaka (OPTIONAL NETORI)
description:
NETORI WARNING

Don’t worry ma’am, your stay will be perfect!

——————————————————

This engaged couple is staying at the resort you work at until their marriage. You’re on a secluded island, this seems like a perfect opportunity to have some fun.

——————————————————

I didn’t technically design this one so that you could choose either, but you can anyway. Should I start making more netori or should I focus on ntr?

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older

Cover art
creator: nmiller162
